per_testcase.name: Verify Heading Content
per_testcase.what_testcase_checks: h3 text includes exact string 'Music Album Collection'
per_testcase.found_in_description: The webpage has a heading element with the text 'Music Album Collection'.
missing_from_description: Exact tag level for the heading element

per_testcase.name: Verify Input and Button Types
per_testcase.found_in_description: Requirements for input and button types

per_testcase.name: Verify Placeholder and Label Texts
per_testcase.found_in_description: Placeholders and labels for album name, release year, genre, and favorite
missing_from_description: Exact label texts for albumName, releaseYear, genre, and favorite

per_testcase.name: Verify Page Title
per_testcase.found_in_description: Webpage title must be 'Music Album Collection Manager'

per_testcase.name: Verify Album Initial State and Validation
per_testcase.what_testcase_checks: Initial album list content, initial favorite list content, initial error message, and error message after clicking add album button
per_testcase.found_in_description: Form validates inputs and displays an error message if any field is empty
missing_from_description: Explicit description of initial states for album list, favorite list, and error message

per_testcase.name: Verify Normal Album Addition and Reset
per_testcase.what_testcase_checks: Album list content, input fields being cleared, and favorite checkbox after submitting
per_testcase.found_in_description: Album details are added to the list upon submission, and input fields are cleared after successful submission
missing_from_description: Explicit description of album list content and the specific behavior of the favorite checkbox after submission

per_testcase.name: Verify Favorite Album Addition and Reset
per_testcase.what_testcase_checks: Favorite list content, error message, input fields being cleared, and favorite checkbox after submitting
per_testcase.found_in_description: Album details are added to the list upon submission, and input fields are cleared after successful submission
missing_from_description: Explicit description of favorite list content and the specific behavior of the favorite checkbox after submission
